basic_details.job_title: CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI)
basic_details.short_information: National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI) Recruitment 2026: National Environmental Engineering Research Institute has released the official notification for 1 Project Associate-I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in West Bengal. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 5 years; OBC: 3 years

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Environmental Science/ Biotechnology/ Zoology/ Botany, B.E./B. Tech in Environmental/ Biotechnology Engineering
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Environmental Science/ Biotechnology/ Zoology/ Botany OR B.E./B. Tech in Environmental/ Biotechnology Engineering from a recognized University.

salary_details.details: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA (NET/GATE qualified) or Rs. 25,000/- + HRA (others) Per Month

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NEERI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I posts is 15th June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate-I position at CSIR NEERI as per the latest recruitment notification released.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Environmental Science/ Biotechnology/ Zoology/ Botany or a B.E./B. Tech in Environmental/ Biotechnology Engineering from a recognized University to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 31,000/- plus HRA, depending on their qualifications and NET/GATE status.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for CSIR NEERI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate-I recruitment will primarily involve an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for the CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I posts?
faq.answer: Applications for the Project Associate-I posts must be submitted through the online mode only. Candidates need to visit the official website or use the provided link to apply.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the CSIR NEERI NEERI Project Associate-I recruitment located?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for a position in Kolkata, West Bengal. Candidates applying should be willing to work in this location if selected.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Associate-I position at CSIR NEERI is contractual. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure as specified in the appointment letter.
